title: Radius Chat
description: Chats only appear in a specific radius, but using the shout command, lets everyone see your message!
body:
Chats only appear to people that are in a radius of 40 blocks.

If you're trying to let everyone know something, without having to find them first-
there is a command that lets everyone see your message!

/shout <message> -> Everyone in the server sees your message

If there's anything not working, or you would want me to make other versions, let me know in my **[Community Discord](https://discord.gg/xYwZNepebc)**.
**_(Make a ticket for it)_**
